prompt: Write me a DayZ mod that loads a JSON config file and prints the values
expected_output: Must use JsonFileLoader<T>.JsonLoadFile(path, cfg) with a pre-allocated object passed by reference. Must NOT assign the return value of JsonLoadFile (it returns void). Must use FileExist() guard before loading. Must use $profile: path prefix.
assertions: Code does NOT contain 'cfg = JsonFileLoader' or 'config = JsonFileLoader' on left side of assignment
Code contains 'new MyConfig()' or similar pre-allocation before JsonLoadFile call
Code contains 'JsonFileLoader' with two arguments (path, object)
Code contains 'FileExist' check before loading
No try/catch blocks present
No ternary operators (? :) present

prompt: Create a singleton manager class for a DayZ mod that tracks online players
expected_output: Must have private static ref instance, GetInstance() with lazy init, DestroyInstance() that nulls static ref. Must include comment or code showing cleanup in OnMissionFinish. Must use Class.CastTo for player downcasting. Must check GetGame().IsServer().
assertions: Code contains 'private static ref' for singleton instance
Code contains 'DestroyInstance' or equivalent cleanup method that nulls the static ref
Code mentions OnMissionFinish for cleanup lifecycle
Code uses Class.CastTo for any Man-to-PlayerBase cast
Code does NOT use try/catch
Code does NOT use ternary operator
Code does NOT use do...while

prompt: Write an RPC handler for a DayZ mod that receives a player name from the client and processes it on the server
expected_output: Must validate CallType is Server. Must validate sender identity is not null. Must validate ctx.Read() succeeds before using data. Must use Param types or ScriptRPC Write/Read pattern. Must not trust client data without validation.
assertions: Code checks CallType.Server or equivalent server-side validation
Code checks sender/identity is not null
Code checks ctx.Read() return value before using data
Code does NOT use try/catch for error handling
Code uses guard clauses (early return) pattern

prompt: Create a custom DayZ item with a continuous action (progress bar) that repairs another item
expected_output: Must extend ActionContinuousBase (not ActionSingleUseBase for progress bar actions). Must override CreateConditionComponents with CCI/CCT classes. Must override OnFinishProgressServer for server-side effect. Must register action via modded class SetActions(). Must call super.SetActions().
assertions: Code extends ActionContinuousBase (not ActionSingleUseBase)
Code contains CreateConditionComponents override
Code contains OnFinishProgressServer or OnFinishProgress override
Code contains 'override void SetActions' with 'super.SetActions()'
Code contains 'AddAction' call to register the action
Code uses Class.CastTo for any target entity casting

prompt: Write code that finds all vehicles on the DayZ map and prints their positions
expected_output: Must NOT use GetObjectsAtPosition3D with huge radius (anti-pattern). Should use a registration-based registry pattern (register in EEInit, unregister in EEDelete) or iterate a cached collection. If the response uses world scan, it must note this is for one-time use only, not per-frame.
assertions: Code does NOT call GetObjectsAtPosition3D with radius > 1000 in a loop or OnUpdate
Code prefers registration-based tracking OR explicitly warns about performance
If using world scan, code is NOT inside OnUpdate or per-frame method
